name: ross-claude-toolkit
description: Cross-project skills and agents: systematic research workflows, code optimization, documentation management, adversarial plan review, and more.
author: baltwross

skills.name: research
skills.description: Systematic 9-step research workflow that produces documented, reproducible findings with codebase analysis, acceptance criteria, and structured recommendations.

skills.name: frontier-model-landscape
skills.description: Up-to-date reference for frontier AI models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google: model IDs, capabilities, context windows, pricing, benchmarks, and modality support.

skills.name: model-api-parameter-reference
skills.description: API parameter reference for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models: valid parameter values per model, feature support matrices, reasoning controls, and common gotchas.

agents.name: claude-code-optimizer
agents.description: Analyze and optimize Claude Code setup, configuration, and agentic coding workflows

agents.name: conversational-insights
agents.description: Capture and document key insights from conversation threads into structured docs

agents.name: docs-manager
agents.description: Create, update, analyze, and maintain project documentation

agents.name: red-team-analyst
agents.description: Adversarial review of plans, proposals, and implementation strategies before execution

agents.name: research-conductor
agents.description: Expert research analysis on topics, concepts, technologies, and questions

agents.name: skills-architect
agents.description: Create and organize Claude Skills configurations following official patterns

agents.name: tech-research-analyst
agents.description: In-depth technical research on frameworks, tools, SDKs, and APIs
